message:
fix(transport): Correct WebSocket test masking and codec test behavior

- Fix WebSocket tests to use masked frames for client→server scenarios
  per RFC 6455 requirements (test_close_frame, test_ping_auto_pong,
  test_transport_roundtrip)
- Refactor test_ping_auto_pong to use existing build_masked_frame helper
- Update codec test to match new pre-check behavior that rejects
  oversized input chunks
- Apply rustfmt to sse.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
